name: anime-six-degrees-desktop
description: Desktop app packaging for Six Degrees of Anime

scripts.build:frontend: rm -rf dist/frontend && cd ../frontend && VITE_API_BASE_URL= npm run build && cd ../desktop && mkdir -p dist && cp -R ../frontend/dist dist/frontend
scripts.build:backend: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && rm -rf dist/backend build/pyinstaller && .venv/bin/pyinstaller backend_launcher.spec --noconfirm --distpath dist/backend --workpath build/pyinstaller
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
